title: CLI: Live Browser Detection Mode

use_cases.name: Start Live Server
steps: findOpenPort(start=8400) finds available port if --port not given

use_cases.name: Stop Live Server
steps: cli.js calls liveCli() with stop arg
liveCli() reads LIVE_PID_FILE to get port
Server calls shutdown(): delete PID file, server.close(), process.exit(0)

use_cases.name: View Live Mode Help
steps: Prints usage: commands (live, live stop) and options (--port)

use_cases.name: Inject Overlay Script into Browser
use_cases.trigger: Developer manually runs snippet in browser console

use_cases.name: Real-Time Anti-Pattern Detection in Browser
use_cases.trigger: Overlay script loaded and running in page
steps: Browser script scans DOM elements for anti-patterns
IntersectionObserver reveals/hides overlays as elements enter viewport
positionOverlay() anchors highlight boxes to target elements
Banner + per-element outline overlays rendered with CSS (z-index 100001+)
Toggle button (◉/◎) shows/hides all overlays via impeccable-hidden class
On re-scan: remove all overlays, re-run detection loop

use_cases.name: Remote Stop via HTTP
steps: shutdown() deletes PID file, closes server, exits

key_components.cli.js: Entry point; routes 'live' command to liveCli()
key_components.liveCli(): Async function in detect-antipatterns.mjs; handles start/stop/help modes
key_components.detect-antipatterns-browser.js: Pre-built browser bundle served at /detect.js (must be built via 'npm run build:browser')
key_components.LIVE_PID_FILE: os.tmpdir()/impeccable-live.json — stores {pid, port} for stop coordination
key_components.findOpenPort(start=8400): Probes ports incrementally until an unused one is found
key_components.Browser Overlay: Injected script; highlights anti-patterns with CSS overlays, banner, toggle button

server_endpoints: GET /detect.js  — serve browser overlay script (Content-Type: application/javascript)
important_notes: CORS headers set to * on all responses — allows injection from any origin
Server only binds to 127.0.0.1 (loopback), not exposed on network
PID file enables CLI-to-server stop coordination without a daemon manager
Browser script must be pre-built (npm run build:browser) — liveCli() fails if missing
SIGINT/SIGTERM handlers call shutdown() for clean exit
Overlay uses IntersectionObserver for lazy reveal with stagger animation (60ms/item, max 600ms)
relationships: Developer --stop--> liveCli() reads LIVE_PID_FILE --> HTTP GET /stop --> shutdown()
